ive probably asked like a million times but now i have dreams and +12 titans blade <:T_stare:1400771751650136145> trying to play da discard team
are you asking what to put in the empty slots
yupp

Corpo can have blade and whatever crit/death resistance wheel

Aurita can run Rewinding Time and Til the Snow Melts (GHelot event wheel, buyable from shop, you only need E0)

Casiah can have literally anything, Dusk and Dawn, To My Dearest Friend, Sever and Scar (for the 3x telekinesis str down), whatever you need

Gmurphy is your keyflare bot and gets thais wheel and gateway of truth
for covs, crimson pulse on aurita and casiah, lifedrain on gmurphy
i see i see
tysm
try to stack a lot of crit on this team cos your main damage is from red tentacle triggers
and tentacle crit is based on your team crit
its why you are running two crimson pulse
makes sense
oh yeah im also running encounter in pure white
for another discard opportunity

How good is a full counter team like Nautila, Pandia, Wanda and Winkle? The idea is big counter numbers :3
i think viable for arc 1 but then really hard to make work in arc 2
first of all your counter is capped
second of all enemies in hard difficulty hit like trucks
sometimes more than your entire max hp so its literally impossible to shield
So counter teams are good early game, mid at like level 60 and really hard to make work beyond that
However
I have seen people clear dtide alert 5 with invested wanda
so its not impossible just tough
its up to you whether you want to put yourself through that <@890219825991925780>
i see
i think its specific boss and relic dependent
so on certain fights you can bring wanda
but you will probably want to have a backup team
and that team will probably end up becoming your main team and the counter team your niche party trick
Guys new player here, i pulled each of "Helot, 24,  tawil and faint " once, are any of those Good?
I think it would be funny thou
for endgame dtide you will need 5 teams so you can have the counter team be one of them
alert 3 should be fine

helot niche support for strike dps like lotan
24 niche (i don't know much about her)
Tawil ok support, big bag of tricks, at high investment can be a dps
faint weak early game, S tier late game
as a new player you can just mess around with different characters, the fights are not too hard
Okay, thank you
Really? I just keep hearing this is hardest gacha game lol that had me worried
late game is hard
i meant early game is easy
like chapters 1 and 2 you can just try out different characters
about chapter 5 is when you need to put together a real team with synergy
before that you can take the time to learn
